prompt_text: Hey, this sounds like a fun little project! Can you create a single self-contained HTML file with a real-time string reverser? Input field where you type text, reversed output that updates live below it, with some cool character-by-character animation feedback as the result changes. Clean centered layout with modern styling would be great. Thanks!

Each character should appear with a visual animation or highlight effect to give character-by-character feedback. Use a clean centered layout and modern styling.
